ksa_text: Ability to establish and oversee human oversight mechanisms and transparency governance requirements for AI systems to ensure human control and explainability.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Chief of Staff to CDAIO roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for Chief of Staff to CDAIO. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Chief of Staff to CDAIO competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO. All passes support exclusion.
